title: 6 Pieces Soy Sauce Dish, 7.3 x 2.7 cm Square Dip Bowls, Small Mini Dipping Bowls,Dishwasher Safe Small Serving Dish,Dip Bowl for Tapas,Dining and Party, 7.3cm Side Seasoning Dish for Sushi Snacks
features: Premium Materials: Small bowls are crafted from food-grade safe plastic, it offers exceptional wear resistance and impact strength for enhanced safety during use. Its smooth surface facilitates effortless cleaning, and direct food contact is completely worry-free, ensuring a more satisfying dining experience every time.

Non-Slip Design: Square soy sauce bowl base features a special anti-slip and drip-proof function, ensuring greater stability during use and preventing spills. When not in use, they stack neatly to save cabinet space, keeping your kitchen tidy and organized.

Perfect Size: Each dipping sauce bowls set includes 6 pieces. The unique dimensions of 7.3×7.3×2.7 cm are ideal for holding small portions of condiments or snacks. Ensuring you have the perfect accompaniment solution for family gatherings or everyday meals.

Easy Cleaning: The smooth surface design allows for effortless cleaning, making small serving bowls simple to remove any food residue. Just use mild soapy water to easily remove grease, without worrying about lingering odors, keeping your dipping dishes clean and fresh at all times.

Versatile Use: This soy sauce bowls excels not only for soy sauce, salad dressing, and ketchup but also for nuts, olives, and other small bites. It even pairs perfectly with herbs and seasonings. Whether for everyday use or formal gatherings, it stands as an indispensable, high-quality tableware choice.
description: Features: White soy sauce dish made from food-grade plastic that meets safety standards, it is safe for direct food contact, ensuring peace of mind. The durable material guarantees a long service life. The non-slip base design enhances stability, while its wear-resistant and impact-resistant properties effectively reduce the risk of accidental drops, ensuring kitchen safety. Soy sauce bowl features a stackable storage design to save cabinet space, keeping kitchen utensils organized and improving kitchen efficiency. Sauce dish has a smooth, non-stick surface for easy cleaning. No need to worry about food residue—simply rinse with mild soapy water. Versatile design accommodates condiments, snacks, or cooking herbs and spices, offering exceptional practicality. Product Information Name: Small Bowls for Dips Material: Food-grade plastic Color: White Dimensions: 7.3 x 7.3 x 2.7 cm Package Contents: 6 x Sauce Bowls for Dips Notes: Due to manual measurement, allow for 1-5mm size variation. Though durable, avoid prolonged impact or high-temperature environments to maintain longevity. Clean with a soft cloth or sponge. Never scrape the surface with hard tools to preserve smoothness.
